concerns.text: FR-015 mandates a KS test on baseline metrics, but User Story 2 Acceptance Scenario 4 only describes performing the KS test on 'distribution of rate of change metrics' (DP-GMM signatures). The specific procedure to compare baseline reconstruction error distributions (GMM/ARIMA) against the DP-GMM signature distribution, as required by FR-015, is missing from the acceptance scenarios. The scenario must explicitly state: 'When performing the KS test, Then the system outputs the KS statistic and p-value comparing the baseline reconstruction error distribution against the DP-GMM signature distribution.'
